Home / Service Areas / Nashville

Landscaping in Nashville, TN

Trusted local professionals serving Nashville and surrounding communities

Serving Nashville, TN

ABM Landscaping LLC is a premier landscaping company serving the greater Nashville area. From downtown gardens to suburban lawns, we offer a comprehensive range of services to meet the diverse needs of Nashville residents. We understand the unique challenges and opportunities presented by Nashville's urban and suburban landscapes and are committed to providing exceptional results. Our services include landscape design, lawn care, hardscaping, and irrigation system installation and maintenance. We specialize in creating outdoor spaces that are both beautiful and functional, taking into account the specific needs of each property. With Nashville's growing popularity, enhancing your property’s curb appeal with ABM Landscaping LLC is a surefire way to increase its value.

Nashville, TN is a vibrant city with a diverse landscape, experiencing hot, humid summers.

Landscaping Services in Nashville

Landscape Design

Custom landscape designs that enhance your property's beauty and value.

Learn more →

Lawn Care

Professional lawn care services to keep your lawn healthy and vibrant year-round.

Learn more →

Hardscaping

Enhance your outdoor living space with custom patios, walkways, and retaining walls.

Learn more →

Outdoor Lighting

Illuminate your landscape with energy-efficient and aesthetically pleasing outdoor lighting solutions.

Learn more →

Irrigation Systems

Efficient irrigation systems to keep your lawn and garden healthy and hydrated.

Learn more →

Seasonal Clean-Up

Keep your yard looking its best with our spring and fall clean-up services.

Learn more →

Drainage Solutions

Prevent water damage with our expert drainage solutions for your property.

Learn more →

Need Landscaping in Nashville?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Nashville and the surrounding area.
